what_it_does: Stores metadata for a channel-memory attachment that points to a board item via a board:// URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
concerns: File contains no payload or context beyond the metadata link
Meaning of the board:// URI scheme is not defined in this file
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry linking dragnet-development channel memory to board item item-fa638e61.
questions: What content or action does board://item-fa638e61 represent?
Is there supposed to be a body or additional payload?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the file behaves as a typed, timestamped link record, which matches the expected role of a channel attachment metadata file.
intention_signals: To record that a specific board item is associated with the dragnet-development channel memory at a precise time.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to identify the target board item.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed edge between a channel memory attachment and a board item, supporting audit and cross-reference without embedding payload content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel memory attachment record (att-7657d377) in dragnet-development of type board_items targeting board item item-fa638e61, created on 2026-06-24.
intention_for_embedding: To log the association of board item item-fa638e61 with the dragnet-development channel memory.
